briefs.title: BC Updates Controlled Recreation Area Boundaries at Resort Timber Zones
briefs.summary: BC updated the official maps that define 'controlled recreation areas' (land around ski and mountain resorts where timber harvesting is managed) under the Resort Timber Administration Act, replacing the old Section 8 with new 2024 boundary designations.
briefs.action_required: Check with the Mountain Resorts Branch if your operations are near a BC resort timber zone to confirm your land boundaries.
